CustomField.formula: IF(Parent_User_Setting__r.Country__r.Name = "Brand Equity", "en", IF(Parent_User_Setting__r.Country__r.Name = "OTC", "en", IF(Parent_User_Setting__r.Country__r.Name = "Biosimilars", "en", IF(Country_name__c = "Italy" , "it", IF(Country_name__c = "Spain" , "es", IF(Country_name__c = "Poland" , "pl", IF(Country_name__c = "Portugal" , "pt", IF(Country_name__c = "Germany", "de", IF(Country_name__c = "Switzerland", "de", IF(Country_name__c = "Slovakia", "sk", IF(Country_name__c = "Slovenia", "sl", IF(Country_name__c = "Austria", "de", IF(Country_name__c = "Serbia", "sr", IF(Country_name__c = "Croatia", "hr", IF(Country_name__c = "France", "fr","en" )))))))))))))))
CustomField.label: Language
